subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of guidance! Hafiz of Shiraz sayeth: "All the parrots of India become sugar-crushers from this sweetness" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهتدی بنور هدی حافظ شیرازی میگوید شکرشکن شوند همه طوطیان هند زین قند
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
